name: Asparagus and Mozarella Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound medium size asparagus, stalks peeled
2 tablespoons Champagne or white wine vinegar
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
1/2 pound fresh mozzarella, cut into sticks about 1/4 inch wide and 1 inch long
4 ounces wafer thin slices (rounds) of salami
1/4 cup slivered roasted red bell pepper (from the jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add asparagus and cook for 3-4 minutes or until just cooked through.
2. Drain the asparagus under cold running water to stop the cooking process.
3. Pat dry with paper towels and cut the spears diagonally into 1-inch long pieces.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, vinegar, Dijon mustard, minced garlic, salt, and freshly ground black pepper until well combined.
5. In an individual serving dish or on a platter, arrange alternating rounds of tomato and salami around the edge.
6. Place the asparagus and mozzarella mixture in the center.
7. Drizzle with half of the dressing.
8. Garnish with roasted red bell peppers.
Yield: 2 servings
